name: Spaghetti
description: Treat yourself to a delicious and healthy meal with fresh  Produce Unbranded Spaghetti Squash. You can even make scrumptious vegan or vegetarian meals using this versatile squash. If you're feeling creative you can make Spaghetti Squash tacos  Spaghetti Squash casserole  or even pad Thai. name: Organic Yellow Squash
description: Wholesum's fresh organic yellow squash is as delicious as it is versatile  making it the perfect addition to healthy and hearty meals. For more savory options  try them grilled  roasted  or air fried. They are also a perfect addition to vegetable  pasta dishes and skewers. If craving something on the sweet side  you may even feature this lovely vegetable on the dessert table. Try grating them into a fluffy yellow squash Bundt cake or bread. Any way that you enjoy it  yellow squash promises to deliver on flavor and is rich in essential vitamins  nutrients  and antioxidants. Wholesum is committed to bringing you a variety of premium Wrapped organic produce that is fresh  flavorful  and responsibly grown.

name: Organic Zucchini Squash
description: Organic zucchini is always fresh  and has a light  delicate flavor with a creamy texture. It can be enjoyed raw with your favorite veggie dip or cooked. Dice and saut\u00E9 with other fresh veggies  roast in the oven topped with parmesan cheese or grate it into delicious zucchini frittatas. Zucchini also makes a great low-carb pasta alternative. Simply spiralize the fresh zucchini and prepare it with your choice of toppings. Best yet  zucchini is packed with many essential vitamins such as vitamin B6 and rich in antioxidants  making it a great addition to a healthy diet. The possibilities are endless and always flavorful with fresh organic zucchini.

name: Torani Sugar Free Vanilla Syrup
description: Get all that pure vanilla taste, complete with the crisp, pure vanilla flavor you crave, without any sugar. Bring the crisp, clean flavors of vanilla to your drinks without the calories with Torani Sugar Free Vanilla Syrup. This sugar-free coffee syrup is sweetened with sucralose, so you can enjoy custom drinks, guilt-free. This Torani coffee flavoring syrup lets you create your favorite vanilla specialty coffee drink in the comfort of your own kitchen. Perfect for beverages, Torani Sugar-Free Vanilla flavoring syrup is tasty added to coffee, cocoa, mixed drinks, frappes, smoothies, great as a dessert topping, and even as the secret ingredient in home-baked treats. Torani Sugar Free Syrups have zero sugar so you can enjoy flavor without the calories. Satisfy your taste for inspiration: explore, create, and delight your senses with Torani flavors. Combine our wide selection of skinny syrups to create unique custom calorie-free flavors. With zero sugar and zero carbs, use Torani Sugar Free Flavored Syrups for coffee to add delicious flavor without the calories to coffee drinks, espresso, cappuccino, tea, latte, cold brew, frappe and more. This vanilla syrup pairs especially well with flavors like chocolate, caramel. and hazelnut. The possibilities are endless! In 1925, Rinaldo and Ezilda Torre create hand-crafted syrups from recipes brought over from Lucca, Italy to the North Beach neighborhood in San Francisco, California. By 1933 and the end of Prohibition, Ezilda was one of the first female rectifiers of distilled spirits in the US. She led Torani through the Great Depression and WWII. In 1982 our Vanilla syrup was used in the first flavored latte. We started with just five syrups and have since grown to a portfolio of over 150 sold around the globe. Our flavor experts’ study global trends to learn what people are craving, and then we use our gold standard process to capture the essence of that flavor in a bottle. Our purpose is “Flavor for all, Opportunity for all.” This means that we believe every single bottle of Torani carries two promises: Each bottle promises amazing flavor for your creative beverages, from a classic vanilla latte to a bold, unexpected cocktail. Our flavors can be used however you choose. Each bottle also promises our dedication to help all the people, partners, and communities we touch thrive. We believe that everything starts with people and that businesses can, and should, create more opportunities for people. Enjoy the pure taste of vanilla in this premium sugar-free coffee syrup. This syrup captures the crisp, pure flavors of vanilla without the calories. Crafted with natural flavors and sweetened with Splenda. Zero sugar, zero calories, and carbs, perfect for your keto or low-carb diet. Use for a low-calorie hot or iced coffee, espresso, cappuccino, tea, latte, cold brew, frappe, and more. Torani Sugar Free Syrup delivers all of the flavor and vibrant colors with none of the calories. Proudly created and produced in San Francisco, California USA.
